name: explore_slds_blueprints
description: Search and explore SLDS Blueprints. Provide `name` (string or array, e.g. ["Buttons","Cards"]) to get 1+ blueprint specs in a single call. Use `category`/`search`/`lightning_component`/`slds_class`/`styling_hook` to filter—each accepts a single value or array for multiple. Returns `blueprints` array with full specs.

name.description: Blueprint name(s) to get detailed documentation. Single string or array (e.g., ["Buttons", "Cards"]). Returns 1+ blueprints.

category.description: Filter by blueprint category. Single value or array for multiple categories.

search.description: Search term to filter blueprints by name or description

lightning_component.description: Filter by Lightning component name(s) (e.g., lightning-button or ["lightning-button", "lightning-card"]).

slds_class.description: Filter by SLDS class name(s) (e.g., slds-button or ["slds-button", "slds-accordion"]). Returns blueprints that use any of these classes.

styling_hook.description: Filter by styling hook name(s) (e.g., --slds-c-accordion-heading-color or array). Returns blueprints that reference any of these hooks.
